texto: I don't care what your daddy told you. I don't care what your grandaddy told you. The South lost. Get over it man! -January, 2003; Opening lecture to Intro to Civil War Era Studies, Gettysburg College
explicacao: Citação de Mark A. Weitz sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I don't care what your daddy told you. I don't care what your grandaddy told you. The South lost.…” articula reflexao, humorous-quotes, daddy em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
